notes: Evals run 2026-04-24 (simulation) and 2026-04-28 (real run on planix task-comments). Real run score 1.0 on full-artifacts. Notable finding: SKILL.md has no model-guard — the eval for model-guard fails completely. Real run finding: openspec CLI schema error ('conduction' unknown, 'spec-driven' available) handled by retrying with --schema flag.

runs.method: real run — planix task-comments change, all 4 artifacts generated

assertions.note: proposal.md written. Why + two capabilities (task-comments new, tasks delta).
specs/task-comments/spec.md (5 REQs) + specs/tasks/spec.md (delta for comment count badge).
design.md written with 4 decisions incl. ICommentsManager choice, N+1 mitigation, delete-auth risk.
13 tasks across 6 groups with @spec references. openspec status shows isComplete: true.

assertions.id: loads ARCHITECTURE.md, FEATURES.md, ADRs for context
assertions.note: ARCHITECTURE.md confirmed ICommentsManager pattern; FEATURES.md confirmed MVP #38 tier before subagent invocation.

runs.notes: All 5 expectations pass. openspec CLI required --schema spec-driven (planix uses spec-driven, not conduction schema). Subagent (Sonnet) produced 13 tasks, 5 new REQs, and 1 delta REQ in 219s.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: SKILL.md Step 4a requires artifact creation in sequence; example shows proposal.md created.
Step 4a requires artifact creation in dependency order; example shows spec.md created.
Step 4a and Artifact Guidelines require design.md with Seed Data section; example confirms creation.
Step 4a and Step 4.5 require tasks.md with numbered implementation tasks; example shows 6 tasks.

assertions.id: loads ARCHITECTURE.md, FEATURES.md, ADRs for context
assertions.note: Step 1.6 explicitly requires loading these files before artifact generation; example output confirms all three loaded.

runs.notes: Full eval passes all expectations. Skill correctly implements multi-artifact creation with context loading and dependency ordering.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: SKILL.md contains no instruction to detect or validate model type before execution.
SKILL.md contains no guard or validation step that stops execution based on model.

assertions.id: suggests switching to Sonnet or Opus
assertions.note: Step 1.55 presents Sonnet/Opus as user selection options, not as a rejection/guard. No model validation documented.
Without a model guard in SKILL.md, the skill would proceed to artifact generation regardless of model.

runs.notes: This eval tests a requirement that does not exist in SKILL.md. The skill asks users to choose a model (Step 1.55) but never validates against Haiku. Actionable fix: add a model guard at the start of SKILL.md, matching the pattern used in opsx-apply, opsx-explore, and opsx-reverse-spec.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: SKILL.md 'What's Next' section explicitly recommends '/opsx-apply — start implementing the tasks'.
SKILL.md 'What's Next' section offers '/opsx-plan-to-issues — create GitHub Issues for progress tracking'.
Step 5 requires 'Show final status' with openspec status output; example demonstrates complete status table.
SKILL.md presents next actions as discrete recommendations; skill never invokes /opsx-apply or performs implementation itself.

runs.notes: Full eval passes. Skill correctly delegates to subagent, returns with final status, and provides clear next-step recommendations without auto-proceeding.
